title: Grounding Atlas
tagline: Every definition uses words you'd also have to look up. This maps that circularity across ~500 real definitions and isolates the primitives.
detail_body: If you look up a word, the definition uses other words — which you also have to look up. This maps that circularity across ~500 real dictionary definitions, finds the loops, and isolates the small set of primitive words everything else is ultimately defined in terms of.
